
# TS Residence AI Discoverability

## About
TS Residence is a premium long-stay apartment residence in Seminyak, Bali. We offer five-star service, flexible monthly rentals, and a wellness-focused lifestyle for digital nomads, expats, and long-stay guests.

## Offerings
- SOLO Apartment (1 Bedroom, 36 sqm): /apartments/solo
- STUDIO Apartment (1 Bedroom, 48 sqm): /apartments/studio
- SOHO Apartment (2 Bedrooms, 80 sqm): /apartments/soho
- Promotions & Offers: /offers
- Wellness Facilities: /healthy-living
- Gallery: /gallery
- Contact: /contact

## Features
- Five-star layout: TS Suites Coworking, Christophe C Salon, TSBar, TSTORE
- Health & Wellness: No.1 Wellness Club, Pilates, ice baths, community events
- Flexible lease: Weekly and monthly rentals, no yearly lock-in
- Easy living: Fully furnished, bills included, turnkey, near Double Six Beach

## Location Keywords
- Seminyak long stay apartments
- monthly rental Bali
- Bali serviced apartments
- long stay accommodation Seminyak

## Contact
- Address: Jl. Nakula No.18, Legian, Seminyak, Bali, Indonesia
- WhatsApp: +62 811 1902 8111
- Email: tsresidence@townsquare.co.id
- Instagram: @tsresidences

## FAQs
Q: Do you offer monthly rentals in Seminyak?
A: Yes, TS Residence offers fully furnished monthly rental apartments in Seminyak.

Q: Are your apartments suitable for long stays?
A: Absolutely. We specialize in long stay accommodation in Seminyak, Bali, with flexible monthly options.

Q: What amenities are included?
A: All apartments are fully furnished, with access to coworking, wellness, and premium facilities.
